title: Ganga boat iftar: Allahabad High Court grants bail to 8 accused
description: The Allahabad High Court on Friday granted bail to eight of the fourteen Muslim men booked for hosting an Iftar (fast-breaking evening meal eaten by Muslims during the Ramadan month) on a boat on river Ganga in March. Separate bail petitions of the accused were listed before single benches of Justice Jitendra Kumar Sinha and Justice Rajiv Lochan Shukla. While the Court granted relief to eight accused, the petitions of other accused are pending.The accused Azad Ali, Aamir Kaiki, Danish Saifi, Moh
